game.title: Bellatores
game.setting: Medieval fantasy, 15th century, Five Great Houses
game.monetization_notes: Monetization details not officially announced. Community concern about P2W given NYOU's mobile background (Dragon Chronicles, Duel Summoners). Likely cosmetic + premium currency model.
game.investment: $25M initial (2022), total funding estimated $50M+ with Epic Games MegaGrant

status.russia: Pre-ЗБТ, registration open on playbellatores.ru. Russian ЗБТ scheduled Q1-Q2 2026. Full release 2026.
status.note: Game not yet publicly playable globally

media_reception.igromania_preview: Potential noted but combat sluggish, FPS drops in cities, hitbox issues. 'Bones are there'.
media_reception.massivelyop: Watched with interest; noted ambitious scope, multiple delays

core_mechanics: Non-target (action) combat system — precision and reaction required
Classless progression — no fixed classes or levels
Mastery-based advancement — skills improve through use
Five Great Houses (factions) — permanent choice per account
Realm vs Realm (RvR) warfare — faction territorial battles
Castle and fortress sieges — mass PvP with attacker/defender roles
Open world without loading screens — seamless exploration
Player-driven economy — all gear crafted or traded (no drops)
12+ professions — cooking, armor smithing, livestock management
usp: UE5 medieval visuals — benchmark quality in MMORPG segment
True sandbox economy — nothing drops, everything crafted
Korean devs with Blizzard/NCsoft/XL Games pedigree
known_issues_cbt: Sluggish combat — cannot move and use skills simultaneously
High mana costs reduce weapon-switching in practice
UE5 performance issues — FPS drops in cities
Hitbox problems with ranged weapons at elevation

market.niche: PC MMORPG / Sandbox MMO — Russia & CIS
market.market_size_ru_2025: ~200 bln RUB total gaming market; PC 48% (~96 bln)
market.launch_window: 2026 (ЗБТ Q1-Q2, ОБТ / full release H2 2026 likely)

competitors.title: Albion Online
competitors.key_usp: Player-driven economy, territorial guild battles, cross-platform
competitors.similarity: Direct competitor — sandbox economy, classless, PvP territorial

competitors.title: ArcheAge (Archerage + official)
competitors.key_usp: Houses, farming, sea battles, largest sandbox MMORPG in RU
competitors.similarity: High — same fantasy sandbox + RvR + housing + economy

competitors.title: Black Desert Online
competitors.key_usp: Best action combat in MMORPG, life skills, stunning graphics
competitors.similarity: High graphics benchmark comparison, action combat

competitors.title: Lost Ark
competitors.key_usp: Isometric ARPG + MMORPG hybrid, story-driven, raids
competitors.weakness: Grind treadmill, RU market share lost after initial hype
competitors.similarity: Medium — Korean F2P MMORPG published by Astrum competitor

competitors.title: Mortal Online 2
competitors.key_usp: Hardcore sandbox, full loot PvP, realistic medieval
competitors.weakness: Very small community, English only, paid

competitors.title: New World: Aeternum
competitors.ru_availability: Steam (geo issues for RU), no official support
competitors.weakness: Blocked in RU via Steam, declining playerbase
competitors.similarity: High concept overlap — medieval, RvR, crafting

competitive_gaps: No major F2P medieval RvR MMORPG with AAA UE5 visuals currently available in RU
ArcheAge aging — audience ready for successor
Black Desert has best combat but poor economy/faction systems vs Bellatores
Albion Online has economy depth but dated graphics — Bellatores has visual edge
No major 5-faction political MMORPG in RU market since old Lineage 2 era

primary.geo: Moscow, St.Petersburg, cities 500k+, all Russia + CIS
primary.behavior: Evening play 19:00-01:00, active on weekends, community-driven (guilds)

segments.name: Hardcore PvP / Guild Leaders
segments.behavior: Researches games in advance, watches KR/CN streams, follows MMORPG media
segments.value: High — organizers, bring guilds, high donat
segments.message: 5 faction wars, castle sieges, political diplomacy

segments.name: Crafters / Economy Players
segments.behavior: Enjoys ArcheAge-style professions, trading, house building

segments.name: MMORPG Fans / Explorer
segments.behavior: Plays every new MMORPG, follows game news, watches streamers
segments.message: UE5 visuals, seamless open world, classless freedom

segments.name: Lapsed MMORPG Players
segments.behavior: Played ArcheAge/Lineage 2 in 2010s, looking for return
segments.message: Новое поколение MMORPG. Помнишь ArcheAge? Bellatores — лучше.

ppc.google_ads_note: Google Ads недоступен в РФ — исключён из стратегии

vk_ads.note: VK сильнее для look-alike по геймерским сообществам

telegram_ads.note: Точечный охват через игровые каналы: goha.ru, mmo13, mmotimes

media_plan_scenarios.note: Детальный медиаплан по фазам — см. отчёт
